review:
I had a great experience with 2 College Brothers on my recent move.  I contacted them multiple times leading up to my move and their estimates and information they provided were spot on.  Scheduling was also very easy given the complexity of my situation with closing on the house I was selling, closing on the house I was buying and trying to move from one place to the other all in a matter of 2 days.  

Chase and Josh G. showed up right on time and worked fiercely to get everything wrapped and loaded up in record speed.  I moved into a condo so it was no easy feet with having to street park the truck and unload it through a freight elevator to get it up to my unit.  Despite this they worked diligently and had everything done before the time estimate I was given.  My furniture and items all arrived in one piece and I couldn't have been more please with the efficiency, speed, and cost that this company provided.
